action: Added `era` subcommand to longtail.py: long-tail share by acquisition decade, acquisition year parsed from creditLine (no explicit field exists; corrected the wrong claim in AGENT_STATE). Parses 3,458/3,458 records. Finding: 2010s acquisitions are 84% never-photographed vs ~0-3% for 1980s-90s.
verification: python3 tests/test_longtail.py (10 tests OK, incl. new era pin), python3 longtail.py era, rare --seed 42 and share re-checked unchanged
next_suggested: Surface the era finding in README/REPORT, or scale toward the full 69,202 records via tate_fetch.sh if a single-call fetch works.
